mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, sex, avatar, status, del_flag, login_ip, login_date, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, u.sex, u.avatar, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.created_at, u.updated_at FROM sys_user u WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, u.sex, u.avatar, u.status, u.login_date, u.created_at FROM sys_user u WHERE u.del_flag = '0'
AND u.username LIKE '%' || #{username} || '%'
AND u.phone LIKE '%' || #{phone} || '%'
AND u.status = #{status}
ORDER BY u.id DESC
